hero.subtitle: Every day you overpay for groceries, coffee, and transport — simply because you don't know the local prices. Overseez uses AI to find the cheapest options near you, in your currency, so you stop guessing and start keeping your money.

beforeAfter.label: Real savings
beforeAfter.title: Before vs. After Overseez
beforeAfter.subtitle: These are real price differences our users found — in their first week.

pain.label: The problem
pain.title: Living abroad costs more than it should.
pain.subtitle: You pay more for the same products. You get hit with hidden bank fees. You don't know what a fair price looks like. That uncertainty costs real money — every single day.
pain.q1: You're not overspending. You're being overcharged.
pain.q2: Most people lose money before they even realize it.
pain.q3: The 'foreigner tax' is real — and it costs you hundreds every month.

features.label: Features
features.title: Built for people who refuse to overpay
features.subtitle: AI-powered price comparison, overseas bank fee tracking, and savings analytics — all adjusted to your currency.
features.aiPriceDesc: Get the top 5 cheapest options near you for anything — groceries, petrol, coffee, hotels.
features.locationAwareDesc: Results adjust to your exact location with Google Maps links to every recommendation.
features.savingsTrackerDesc: Log what you spend and watch your savings grow with milestone rewards and analytics.
features.bankFeeDesc: Enter your bank and see the true cost of purchases abroad with overseas fee breakdowns.
features.saleAlertsDesc: Active sales and promotions are merged into your search results automatically.
features.worksGloballyDesc: From London to Tokyo — Overseez adapts to local currencies, stores, and pricing.

globe.label: Global reach
globe.title: Active in 25+ countries worldwide
globe.subtitle: From exchange students in Europe to remote workers in Asia — Overseez helps people save money across every continent.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps to smarter spending
howItWorks.step1Desc: Type what you need — groceries, petrol, a hotel room. Our AI processes your query instantly.
howItWorks.step2Desc: See the top 5 cheapest options ranked by real price, with distance, sales, and bank fees factored in.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Log your purchase and we calculate your saving vs the average. Watch your total grow over time.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people saving real money abroad.

items.text: I came to Berlin on a FLEX exchange program and was shocked at grocery prices. Overseez showed me stores 40% cheaper just two blocks from my dorm.
items.name: Sofia M.

items.text: As a uni student in London, every pound matters. This tool helped me find cheaper food, transport, and even my gym membership.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.text: Did Work and Travel in the US last summer. Overseez saved me from tourist traps and found local prices in every city I visited.
items.name: Mia L.

items.text: The savings tracker is addictive. Watching my monthly savings climb past $200 during my YES program year was incredibly motivating.
items.name: James R.

items.text: I recommend Overseez to every international student. The AI is surprisingly accurate and the Google Maps links are a lifesaver on campus.
items.name: Aisha T.

items.text: As an Au Pair in France, my budget was tight. Overseez helped me plan every purchase smarter and avoid hidden bank fees.
items.name: Luca B.

items.text: The currency conversion feature is seamless. During my Erasmus semester I always knew exactly what I was paying in my home currency.
items.name: Elena V.

items.text: Honestly didn't expect much, but the first search saved me €15 on weekly groceries. Been hooked since my first week abroad.
items.name: Marco P.

items.text: The location-based search is brilliant. It finds deals I would never discover on my own, even after a full semester at Waseda.
items.name: Yuki S.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Choose the plan that works for you.
subscription.caseTitle: How Maria saved more than her subscription — on coffee alone.
subscription.caseP1: Maria moved from Brazil to London for university. Every morning, she bought coffee at the café nearest to campus — $5.30 each time. She assumed that was the going rate.
subscription.caseP2: After signing up for Overseez, she searched "coffee near me" and discovered three cheaper options within a 5-minute walk. She switched to a local spot charging $2.65.
subscription.caseConclusion: From just one product, Maria's savings covered her $10 subscription nearly eight times over.
subscription.caseQuote: "I was paying the foreigner tax without even knowing it. Now I save on everything — groceries, transport, even my phone plan." — Maria S., London
subscription.premiumSubtitle: You save more than you pay.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.agreeNote: By creating an account, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Text: Overseez provides AI-generated price comparisons based on available data. We do not guarantee the accuracy of prices displayed. Actual prices may vary depending on the retailer, time of purchase, location, and ongoing promotions. Always verify prices at the point of sale before making a purchase decision.
terms.s2Text: Overseez is not responsible for any financial decisions made based on the information provided through our platform. The comparisons, savings estimates, and recommendations are for informational purposes only. Users assume full responsibility for their purchasing decisions.
terms.s3Text: Promotions, sales, and offers displayed on Overseez are subject to change without notice. Overseez is not affiliated with any retailers, supermarkets, or service providers shown in search results. We aggregate publicly available data to provide price comparisons.
terms.s4Text: Your search queries and savings data are stored securely and used to improve your experience. We do not sell personal data to third parties. Location data is used only to provide relevant nearby results and is not stored permanently. You can delete your account and all associated data at any time.
terms.s5Text: Premium features require a paid subscription at £10/month. You can cancel at any time through your account settings. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. Free tier users receive 10 AI questions per 24-hour period, which resets automatically.
terms.s6Text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. Do not share your password with others. Overseez reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms or engage in abusive behaviour.
terms.s7Text: All content, design, and technology on the Overseez platform are owned by Overseez and protected by copyright law. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any content without prior written permission.
terms.s8Text: Overseez reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We will notify users of significant changes via email.
